title: cuphea lutescens
intro: Cuphea lutescens, also known as Yellow Cuphea or Yellow Smokebush, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cuphea lutescens include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting respiratory health. Cuphea lutescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be utilized for its medicinal benefits.
